/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librcl_yaml_param_parser.so -o librcl_yaml_param_parser.so CMakeFiles/rcl_yaml_param_parser.dir/src/add_to_arrays.c.o CMakeFiles/rcl_yaml_param_parser.dir/src/namespace.c.o CMakeFiles/rcl_yaml_param_parser.dir/src/node_params.c.o CMakeFiles/rcl_yaml_param_parser.dir/src/parse.c.o CMakeFiles/rcl_yaml_param_parser.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/rcl_yaml_param_parser.dir/src/yaml_variant.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/install/libyaml_vendor/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rmw/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /root/ros2_ws/install/libyaml_vendor/lib/libyaml.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rmw/lib/librmw.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
